query: Sono un consulente sicurezza sul lavoro: trovami PMI italiane con cantieri, produzione, appalti o crescita del personale operativo
root_causes: The executor applied the global discovery query cap before guaranteeing one query per required signal lane.
Canonical signal aliases hiring_operational and contract_awarded were not both recognized by the deterministic signal-query layer.
The extraction budget could be consumed by multiple chunks from the same source before other required lanes received an evidence attempt.
The worker did not enforce the prepare-only execution_authorized boundary before claiming the shadow job.
